name: Cinnamon Churros
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat the butter with 1 tablespoon of sugar and 1 teaspoon salt until boiling.
2. Remove the pan from heat; add the cornmeal and flour all at once.
3. Over low heat, cook the mixture, stirring constantly, until it forms a ball (about 1 minute).
4. Beat in the eggs one at a time, beating vigorously after each addition until the dough is smooth.
5. Line a baking sheet with paper towels.
6. In a large bowl or paper bag, mix the remaining sugar and cinnamon.
7. Heat salad oil to 375°F in a deep heavy skillet or Dutch oven.
8. Fill a pastry bag fitted with a number 6 tip with the dough.
9. Pipe 5-inch lengths of dough into the hot oil.
10. Fry until browned on both sides, about 1½ minutes per side.
11. Using a slotted spoon, remove the churros from the oil and place them on the baking sheet.
12. While still hot, dip in the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
13. Serve immediately. Makes about 2 dozen.
